description:
## Component: hx-side-nav (NEW) **Tier 2 — Standard Enterprise | Industry Consensus: 3/6 libraries** Collapsible left-side navigation panel with nested menu items. ### ADR-001 Classification: Slot-Driven (Composite) Drupal menu system controls navigation items via slots. ### API Design **Properties:** `collapsed` (boolean — icon-only mode), `label` (nav landmark label) **Slots:** Default (hx-nav-item children), `header` (logo/branding), `footer` (user/settings) **CSS Parts:** `nav`, `header`, `body`, `footer` **Events:** `hx-collapse`, `hx-expand` ### Child: hx-nav-item **Properties:** `href`, `active`, `expanded`, `disabled` **Slots:** Default (label), `icon`, `badge`, `children` (sub-items) ### Drupal Integration ```twig
{% for item in menu_items %} {{ item.title }} {% if item.below %} {% for child in item.below %} {{ child.title }} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} ``` Drupal's menu system (menu_tree, MenuLinkTree) controls structure. Component provides visual treatment. ### Healthcare: Clinical portal navigation, admin dashboards, department navigation ### Acceptance Criteria 1. Collapsed mode shows icons only with tooltips 2. Nested sub-navigation with expand/collapse 3. Active trail highlighting 4. WCAG 2.1 AA: nav landmark, current page indicator 5. Responsive: auto-collapses on small screens
title: T2-37: hx-side-nav — Collapsible Side Navigation
